summary: Iter-2 architecture defined. ADR-3: no EventsState freezed refactor (existing EventFilters + ResultState<List<EventModel>> kept). Backend changes: GET /events + GET /events/upcoming gain 4 query params; new GET /users/:id endpoint. Frontend changes: GetEventsUseCase gains filter params forwarded via @Query to EventService; new GetUserByIdUseCase + RiderProfileCubit + RiderProfilePage + route. 9 l10n keys. No CI/CD changes.

qualityGates.name: architecture_contracts_defined
qualityGates.notes: API contracts for GET /events (filter params) and GET /users/:id defined; Retrofit service signatures specified; DI scope specified

qualityGates.name: no_layer_violations
qualityGates.notes: Domain models remain pure Dart; DTOs stay in data layer; Cubit stays in presentation; no BuildContext in data layer

qualityGates.name: adr_documented
qualityGates.notes: ADR-3: no EventsState freezed refactor documented with rationale in architect.md

qualityGates.name: brownfield_compatibility
qualityGates.notes: Existing EventFilters class, cubit structure, and filter UI preserved; changes are additive only
